overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a historic gas-lit district with cobblestone streets and Victorian architecture. A tram passes by early in the clip, after which the character walks along tree-lined sidewalks and crosses open intersections in the atmospheric, wet streets of Saint Denis.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street intersection with gas lighting

events.description: vintage tram streetcar approaches and passes from right to left on the tracks
character begins walking forward along the street

agents.ego_description: stands by the lamppost observing the street, then begins walking after the tram passes

notable_agents.action: tram streetcar moving along tracks with headlamps illuminated

entered.detail: large white colonial-style mansion with columns and balconies
red brick building with rounded corner and scaffolding
cast iron gas lamp post with warm yellow glow
tree with pink blossoms illuminated by street lamp
green vintage streetcar with glowing headlamps moving along tracks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at night in a historic district with the character standing near a gas lamp. A vintage tram passes by on the cobblestone street, its headlamps cutting through the darkness. The character then begins walking past the large colonial mansions and brick buildings lining the wet, reflective street.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk path with overhanging blossoming branches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beneath the canopy of blossoming trees

entered.detail: black ornate iron fence with decorative stone pillars
dense overhead canopy of trees with pink blossoms creating a tunnel effect

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path lined with ornate iron fences on the left and a park on the right. Overhead, blossoming trees create a dense canopy that partially obscures the night sky, while gas lamps provide pools of warm light along the route.

events.description: character steps off the tree-lined path and crosses the open cobblestone intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the open cobblestone street intersection, turning to follow the road curve

entered.detail: wide open cobblestone street crossing with visible manhole covers and wet reflections

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tree canopy, the character crosses a wide open intersection with cobblestone paving. The space opens up to reveal more of the night sky and distant gas lamps, with the character navigating across the wet reflective stones toward the opposite sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk beside ornate iron fencing, moving toward a more open park area

entered.detail: decorative wrought iron fence with elaborate stone pillars lining the property boundary
tall oak trees with Spanish moss in the park area beyond the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by an ornate iron fence on the right. The path continues past historic properties with the park visible on the left, as the character moves deeper into the gas-lit historic district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gas-lit historic district that shifts from open cobblestone streets to a sheltered park path before returning to a wide urban intersection. It begins with the character standing near a gas lamp as a vintage tram passes by, its headlamps cutting through the darkness of the wet, reflective street lined with colonial mansions. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions into a narrow dirt path where ornate iron fences and a dense canopy of blossoming trees partially obscure the night sky. The environment then opens up as the character emerges from the foliage to cross a wide, cobblestone intersection illuminated by distant lamps. Finally, the camera follows the character along a narrow sidewalk bordered by an iron fence, moving deeper into the atmospheric district past historic properties and the edge of the park.
